scenes.title: Two Vanishing Acts
scenes.visualIntent: Split-screen investigation contrasts an ice-to-water state change with labelled salt grains dispersing through water.
scenes.checkpoint: What evidence would distinguish melting from dissolving?

scenes.title: Meet the Three Roles
scenes.visualIntent: Three labelled cards attach to salt, water and the final cup; arrows combine SOLUTE plus SOLVENT into SOLUTION.

scenes.title: A Safe Dissolving Investigation
scenes.visualIntent: Bench checklist shows labelled food-grade materials and spill cloth; hazard panel excludes tasting, cleaners, medicines, mystery powders and heat.

scenes.title: Dissolving Is Not Melting
scenes.visualIntent: A comparison table highlights ONE MATERIAL, STATE CHANGE for melting and TWO MATERIALS, MIXTURE for dissolving.

scenes.title: Where Did the Salt Go?
scenes.visualIntent: Salt symbols separate among water symbols while a model-limit panel lists not a photo, not to scale, simplified particles and needs evidence.

scenes.title: Rate Means How Fast
scenes.visualIntent: Two matched cups differ only by a stirring arrow; a stopwatch measures time until visible grains are gone.
scenes.checkpoint: Which variable changes, and which variables must stay the same?

scenes.title: Smaller Pieces, Faster Mixing
scenes.visualIntent: Equal-mass coarse and fine salt samples enter identical cups; highlighted outer surfaces connect to separate timers, not different final totals.

scenes.title: Temperature and Rate
scenes.visualIntent: Cool and adult-checked lukewarm cups use equal measures and matched stirring; two clocks emphasise rate while a maximum-amount gauge remains unanswered.

scenes.title: Amount Is How Much
scenes.visualIntent: A split board contrasts stopwatch RATE evidence with measured-spoon AMOUNT evidence; a crossed arrow blocks the inference faster equals more.

scenes.title: Reaching Saturation
scenes.visualIntent: Measured portions enter one by one until a persistent crystal layer remains; labels distinguish saturated solution from excess undissolved solute.
scenes.checkpoint: What does solid at the bottom tell us, and what does it not tell us?

scenes.title: More Solvent Changes the Limit
scenes.visualIntent: A measured cylinder adds water to a saturated cup; crystals shrink while a variable-control panel highlights solvent amount only.

scenes.title: Recovery Is Strong Evidence
scenes.visualIntent: A multi-day covered observation sequence shows water level falling and labelled salt crystals appearing; safety boundary surrounds the adult-managed dish.

scenes.title: Mass Before and After
scenes.visualIntent: Before-and-after closed-system balance readings sit within an uncertainty band; icons flag spills, clinging drops and evaporation as error sources.

scenes.title: Not Everything Dissolves
scenes.visualIntent: Three labelled columns compare settling sand, layered oil and saturated salt, with solution status and observation evidence beneath each.

scenes.title: The Complete Dissolving Story
scenes.visualIntent: Final concept map connects vocabulary, rate factors, amount, saturation, added solvent, recovery evidence, model limits and safety rules.
scenes.checkpoint: Use rate, amount and saturation correctly in a three-sentence explanation.
